sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91844" key="purro/geios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρρό-γειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91844.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with red earth</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:11:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.11.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
